column1: # Beckhoff EL1809 — 16-channel digital input, 24 V DC, 3 ms filter.
# No mailbox: the terminal has a single SyncManager (SM0 Inputs) and does
# NOT support CoE. Identity probing via 0x1018 upload_sdo fails — the
# terminal is treated as a coupler-class device by `bus_config` (no SDO
# init, no DC, no PDO re-assign). PDO mapping is Fixed per ESI.
# Total TxPDO image = 16 × 1 bit = 2 bytes (byte-packed in order).
# Fixed PDO mapping per ESI. Declared for completeness; since no CoE is
# available we don't program these — the terminal ships with this layout.
